delivery.text: 🌿 Same-day delivery in Bratislava · Order by 13:00 · Shop now
hero.label: Botanical florist · Bratislava Old Town
hero.sub: Stem is a small flower shop on Panská in the Old Town. We work with local growers, source seasonally, and tie every bouquet by hand. Same-day delivery across Bratislava.
season.label: In season this month
season.title: May · the garden in full bloom
season.text: Each bouquet is composed from what's flowering this week. Below, a snapshot of what we're working with right now — peonies, ranunculus, lilac, garden roses.
season.c1.title: Peony Party
season.c2.title: Garden mix
season.c3.title: Pastel romance
season.c4.title: Wildflower bunch
shop.label: Shop
shop.title: Choose by occasion
shop.text: Same-day delivery in Bratislava if you order before 13:00. Recipient note included free with every order. International shipping by request.
shop.s1.title: Just because
shop.s1.text: Hand-tied seasonal bouquets from €28. Delivered with a personal note.
shop.s2.title: Birthdays & celebrations
shop.s2.text: Bigger, brighter, with extras like wine, candles or a cake.
shop.s3.title: Get well / sympathy
shop.s3.text: Soft palettes, calmer shapes, suitable for hospitals and homes.
shop.s4.title: Office & subscriptions
shop.s4.text: Weekly fresh flowers for your reception, café or studio. From €60/week.
shop.s5.title: Dried & preserved
shop.s5.text: For interiors that need a long-lasting moment of botanical detail.
shop.s6.title: Gift bundles
shop.s6.text: Bouquet + chocolate + handwritten card, ready to give.
wedding.label: Weddings & events
wedding.title: For the days that matter most.
wedding.text: Bridal bouquets, ceremony arches, reception centerpieces, boutonnières — everything tied with care. We work with around 20 weddings a year, so we never overbook. Free 60-minute consultation, no obligation.
story.label: Our story
story.title: Three years in Old Town, one idea.
story.p1: We opened Stem in 2022 because we couldn't find a flower shop in Bratislava that worked the way we wanted to work — seasonally, locally, and slowly. Most shops sell the same imported tulips year-round. We don't.
story.p2: Every Monday we drive to growers in Senec and Pezinok. Whatever's beautiful that week is what we tie that week. If a flower can't survive the journey, it doesn't make the bouquet.
ws.label: Workshops
ws.title: Learn to tie a bouquet, properly.
ws.text: 2-hour Saturday workshops, max 8 people. We teach the principles — texture, scale, color, line — and you go home with the bouquet you made.
ws.w1.title: Spring garden bouquet
ws.w2.title: Peony & rose hand-tie
ws.w3.title: Wreath making · summer edition
ws.w4.title: Dried flower arrangement
rev.label: Reviews
rev.title: What people say
rev.t1: The bouquet for my mum's birthday arrived two hours after I ordered. Looked twice as nice as the photo. She still has it dried on her dresser.
rev.t2: They did all the florals for our wedding — bridal, ceremony, six tables. Stress-free, on budget, exactly what we discussed. Best money we spent.
rev.t3: We have weekly subscription for our reception desk. Different combinations every Monday, never stale. Worth every euro.
rev.t4: I did a wreath workshop with Stem for my hen-do. We were 8, drank wine, made wreaths, ate snacks. Best 3 hours.
rev.t5: My sympathy bouquet was just right — soft, small, no cliché lilies. They got it without me having to explain.
contact.label: Visit us
contact.title: Open Monday to Saturday
contact.text: Walk-ins always welcome. For weddings and bigger orders please email ahead so we can keep enough flowers for you.
